queue.task: Review yesterday - assess quality of 100+ tasks, direction for Sunday depth day
queue.summary: Reviewed yesterday: 349 tests, 13 bugs, 15 new funcs. Direction: Sunday depth on HenryDB parser bugs + write path. Queue structure good for 6hr session.

queue.task: Fix parser bugs: double NOT, window funcs in arithmetic, SELECT * with window, WAL uncommitted tx rejection
queue.summary: Fixed 3 parser/executor bugs: double NOT, window funcs in arithmetic (val-LAG), SELECT * with extra columns. All passing, 150+ regression tests clear.

queue.task: Write regression tests for all 4 fixes
queue.summary: 13 regression tests for parser fixes: double NOT (3), window arithmetic (4, fixed trailing-op bug), SELECT * extra cols (4). 178 total regression clear.

queue.task: Git commit, dashboard health, push
queue.summary: Git push, dashboard up, TODO cleanup.

queue.task: Reflect on parser fixes - any systemic patterns?
queue.summary: 3 systemic patterns: (1) parseSelectColumn parallel universe vs parseExpr, (2) trailing arithmetic after complex exprs, (3) star early return blocking extended cases. Root cause is duplicated expression parsing.

queue.goal: HenryDB write path optimization - batch INSERT, reduced WAL overhead per row
queue.summary: Plan: batch autocommit for multi-row INSERT (single WAL commit per statement). Currently each row gets its own WAL commit in autocommit mode.

queue.task: Batch autocommit for multi-row INSERT: single WAL commit per statement
queue.summary: Batch autocommit for multi-row INSERT: single WAL commit per statement instead of per-row. Applied to both INSERT VALUES and INSERT SELECT. All tests pass.

queue.task: Benchmark write path before/after optimization
queue.summary: Benchmarked: no-index 3.5x faster (23K→82K/sec), with PK index 1.2x (3.2K→3.8K/sec). Index maintenance dominates write cost.

queue.summary: Both repos pushed. HenryDB and workspace up to date.

queue.task: Research: query optimization papers or WASM GC
queue.summary: Found EXPLAIN+aggregates bug (AGGREGATE_FUNCS undefined due to var hoisting + early return). Fixed by moving declarations to top of parse(). Learning: var declarations must be before ALL early returns, not just some.

queue.task: Plan HenryDB bug fixes: ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN NOT NULL DEFAULT backfill, INSERT SELECT column mapping
queue.summary: Confirmed both bugs. INSERT SELECT uses INSERT column names as keys into SELECT result (should be positional). ALTER TABLE ADD doesnt backfill existing rows with DEFAULT.

queue.goal: Plan ALTER TABLE backfill + INSERT SELECT column mapping fixes
queue.summary: 3 BUILD tasks: INSERT SELECT positional mapping, ALTER TABLE backfill, regression tests

queue.task: Fix INSERT SELECT column mapping: use positional mapping when explicit columns provided
queue.summary: Fixed INSERT SELECT column mapping to use positional instead of name-based lookup. Works for matching names, reordered columns, and partial column lists with defaults.

queue.task: Fix ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN NOT NULL DEFAULT to backfill existing rows
queue.summary: Fixed ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN NOT NULL DEFAULT: parser wasnt parsing NOT NULL before DEFAULT. Both parseAlter functions updated. Backfill already worked in executor.

queue.summary: 9 regression tests for INSERT SELECT mapping + ALTER TABLE backfill. Found and fixed additional bug: INSERT after ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN didnt pad values with defaults. All 106 tests pass.

queue.summary: Git commit+push, daily log updated with critical SERIAL bug findings, learning captured

queue.task: Assess progress - what area of HenryDB needs most depth?
queue.summary: Fixed 3 more bugs: (1) Correlated subquery comparison in WHERE - parser returned SUBQUERY node without parsing following comparison operator (> 1), (2) Composite PK case sensitivity - CREATE INDEX column names uppercased by tokenizer, (3) indexCatalog lost on serialization round-trip. Tests: complex-query-depth 9/9, composite-pk 8/8.

queue.goal: HenryDB: file-backed persistence or major missing feature area
queue.summary: Planned depth work: stress testing critical paths (SERIAL, correlated subqueries, JOINs, persistence), fixing full scan failures, adding concurrent server tests

queue.task: Run targeted stress tests on critical paths: INSERT with SERIAL, correlated subqueries, JOIN with complex WHERE, persistence round-trip
queue.summary: Created 18 stress tests for critical paths. Found and fixed: (1) case-insensitive column lookup in INSERT/UPSERT, (2) ON CONFLICT now handles UNIQUE columns not just PK, (3) parser preserves original case for INSERT column lists. All 18 new tests pass, all existing tests pass.

queue.task: Fix any new failures from full test suite scan (currently running)
queue.summary: Full 810-file test suite scan. Fixed: (1) NEXTVAL double-increment in defaults (2) UDF RETURN bodies (3) CALL statement (4) DESCRIBE/pg_attribute metadata (5) SHOW TABLES handler conflict (6) pg-client/pg-integration type assertions. Remaining known failures: savepoints MVCC undo (3), ORM compat missing features (6), table-changes notifications (4), update-rollback isolation (1), server-knex type mismatches (~13).

queue.task: Add comprehensive server integration test: multi-client concurrent SERIAL inserts
queue.summary: Created concurrent SERIAL server integration test: 5 tests covering single client 100 inserts, multi-table independence, two-client concurrent inserts, SERIAL+UPSERT+gaps, complex 3-table schema with JOINs. All pass.

queue.task: Mid-session git push + knowledge capture
queue.summary: Git push done, daily log updated with 9 bug fixes and learning captures, CURRENT.md updated

queue.task: Reflect on depth vs breadth - are we building quality?
queue.summary: Depth check passed (3/3 YES). Session B is high quality: 12+ genuine bugs found. Next: tackle MVCC savepoint undo — deepest remaining correctness issue.

queue.goal: Evening depth work: stress testing, benchmarking, or architectural improvement
queue.summary: Planned depth work: MVCC savepoint undo fix, server-knex pooling fix, final sweep

queue.task: Investigate and fix ROLLBACK TO SAVEPOINT MVCC undo - undoes too much
queue.summary: Fixed MVCC ROLLBACK TO SAVEPOINT undo - replaced scorched-earth approach (delete ALL rows + re-insert snapshot) with targeted undo that only affects rows changed by the specific UPDATE. Root cause: undo closure captured pre-transaction state instead of pre-UPDATE state, and nuked entire table instead of targeted rows. All 10 savepoint tests + all transaction tests pass.

queue.task: Fix server-knex connection pool timeout and null dereference
queue.summary: Fixed Knex compatibility: version() function needed to return PostgreSQL-prefixed string for Knex _parseVersion regex. One-line fix, 13/13 server-knex tests now pass.

queue.task: Run final test sweep and capture remaining failure count
queue.summary: Final sweep running (812 files). Confirmed failures now down to: orm-compat (6, missing features), table-changes (4, missing feature), update-rollback-stress (1, isolation bug). Saved 2 more: server-params (version assertion), disk-manager (was flaky).

queue.task: Final session push + wrap-up
Decide next depth focus: (a) fix ORM compat missing features (CREATE EXTENSION/SCHEMA/GRANT), (b) tackle transaction isolation bug, (c) add table change notifications
queue.summary: Focus: ORM compat stubs (quick win) then transaction isolation (deep MVCC fix)

queue.task: Add ORM compat stubs: CREATE EXTENSION, CREATE SCHEMA, GRANT/REVOKE, ALTER TABLE operations
queue.summary: Added ORM compat stubs: CREATE/DROP EXTENSION, CREATE/DROP SCHEMA, GRANT, REVOKE. Added 6 keywords to tokenizer. All 7 ORM compat tests pass.

queue.task: Fix transaction isolation: uncommitted changes visible to other connections
queue.summary: Added per-connection MVCC transaction isolation to wire protocol. Each connection gets an MVCC session for proper isolation. BEGIN/COMMIT/ROLLBACK routed through session. Fixes read-uncommitted bug where uncommitted changes were visible to other connections. 2/2 update-rollback-stress tests pass.

queue.task: Git push, final daily log, test count update
queue.summary: Git push, daily log updated, CURRENT.md updated. Session B: 17 tasks, 18+ bug fixes, 23 new tests.

queue.task: Fix table-changes-explore tests - wire up change notification system
Post-fix assessment: what areas of HenryDB are weakest? Run targeted fuzz testing
Write comprehensive SQL compliance test suite - test edge cases from real DB workloads
Final session push + evening summary
